decision.summary: No existing management is needed and there is no valid new price-hit or floor entry this cycle.
decision.rationale: The latest Beecthor transcript and recent summaries still keep the thesis bearish while BTC stays below the 75k-76k invalidation zone, but Binance execution reality is a strong rebound with BTC at 74374.61 near the 24h high and up 4.874%, so fresh downside momentum confirmation is weak. The nearest daily bearish price-hit candidate, `will-bitcoin-dip-to-74k-on-april-14`, is 79.0% and already heavily priced, while weekly bearish candidates start much lower and are too discounted; bullish reach markets conflict with Beecthor’s active thesis. The floor markets above 74k are also invalid because the current thesis still implies BTC can break back below 74k.
